name: All-American Salmon Saute W/Mushroom Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can Low-salt chicken broth, 14 oz (6 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the broth into a small saucepan. Bring to a boil over high heat and reduce to 1 cup. Set aside.
2. In a large skillet, saute mushrooms in oil over medium-high heat for 5 minutes, or until golden brown.
3. Reduce heat to medium and stir in garlic. Saute for 1-2 minutes.
4. Season with pepper.
5. Add yogurt and cornstarch to the reduced broth and whisk to blend.
6. Whisk the yogurt mixture into the mushrooms. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly until thickened.
7. Remove from heat and keep warm.
8. Season salmon steaks with salt and pepper. Cook in a lightly oiled non-stick pan over medium-high heat for 10 minutes per inch of thickness, or until fish flakes when tested with a fork. Turn once while cooking.
9. Arrange each salmon steak on a dinner plate with the reserved sauce. Serving suggestion: Try this with Garlic Mashed Potatoes and buttered peas.
